시편 25:1.content: To you, Yahweh, I lift up my soul.

시편 25:2.content: My God, I have trusted in you. Don’t let me be shamed. Don’t let my enemies triumph over me.

시편 25:3.content: Yes, no one who waits for you will be shamed. They will be shamed who deal treacherously without cause.

시편 25:4.content: Show me your ways, Yahweh. Teach me your paths.

시편 25:5.content: Guide me in your truth, and teach me, For you are the God of my salvation, I wait for you all day long.

시편 25:6.content: Yahweh, remember your tender mercies and your loving kindness, for they are from old times.

시편 25:7.content: Don’t remember the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions. Remember me according to your loving kindness, for your goodness’ sake, Yahweh.

시편 25:8.content: Good and upright is Yahweh, therefore he will instruct sinners in the way.

시편 25:9.content: He will guide the humble in justice. He will teach the humble his way.

시편 25:10.content: All the paths of Yahweh are loving kindness and truth to such as keep his covenant and his testimonies.

시편 25:11.content: For your name’s sake, Yahweh, pardon my iniquity, for it is great.

시편 25:12.content: What man is he who fears Yahweh? He shall instruct him in the way that he shall choose.

시편 25:13.content: His soul will dwell at ease. His offspring will inherit the land.

시편 25:14.content: The friendship of Yahweh is with those who fear him. He will show them his covenant.

시편 25:15.content: My eyes are ever on Yahweh, for he will pluck my feet out of the net.

시편 25:16.content: Turn to me, and have mercy on me, for I am desolate and afflicted.

시편 25:17.content: The troubles of my heart are enlarged. Oh bring me out of my distresses.

시편 25:18.content: Consider my affliction and my travail. Forgive all my sins.

시편 25:19.content: Consider my enemies, for they are many. They hate me with cruel hatred.

시편 25:20.content: Oh keep my soul, and deliver me. Let me not be disappointed, for I take refuge in you.

시편 25:21.content: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, for I wait for you.

시편 25:22.content: Redeem Israel, God, out of all his troubles.
